classes.description: Assistant asserts facts unsupported by available evidence, trace state, or temporal context.
Assistant routes local/workspace/file intent to the wrong tool family or ignores the appropriate available tool family.
Assistant returns no substantive answer or tells the user to retry when it should provide a bounded response.
Assistant repeats fallback or boilerplate text across turns instead of breaking the loop with diagnosis or a direct answer.
Assistant claims backend automation selected tools without evidence, or misstates the LLM/tool-routing responsibility boundary.
Assistant confuses policy-denied, tool-unavailable, and provider-outage states, or fails to provide bounded remediation.
Assistant chooses an unnecessarily complex or incorrect workflow when a simpler/direct workflow should answer the prompt.
Assistant emits feedback that lacks evidence, owner, suspected cause, acceptance criteria, or a concrete next step.
Assistant synthesizes unrelated tool output relative to the user's intent.
